title: calliandra gracilis
intro: Calliandra gracilis, also known as pink powder puff or fairy duster, is a flowering shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Calliandra gracilis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Calliandra gracilis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
